title: Mqryo's Shiny Mobs
description: A Resource Pack that adds rarer variants of your everyday mobs!
body:
![Divisore](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cd984ed539088af048f8daac6003a2b2314749ff_0.webp)
![Shiny Mobs Logo New](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc2e474d936cd7de66b47c2241999bf0c786c4ff.png)
Shiny Mobs is a resource pack that gives **every mob in the game** a rarer variant you can find either through breeding or by looking around like a true shiny hunter!
All Shiny mobs have a **1%** chance to spawn, have fun looking for them :D


<details>
<summary>Shiny Mobs Showcase</summary>

![Mobs Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d5b9e656446c2be65b82483e882bbc0f035326b_0.webp)
</details>

The Resource pack **can** be used with Fresh Animations, but its not 100% compatible.
The mobs may lose some animations. An Add-On to make it 100% compatible is in the works!

![Divisore](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cd984ed539088af048f8daac6003a2b2314749ff_0.webp)
![Optifine](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f5e77a177688b8db8acdf0781598c4d9c9bcfa15.png)

The Resource pack needs either Optifine or ETF in order to work.
![Divisore](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cd984ed539088af048f8daac6003a2b2314749ff_0.webp)

![Tiny](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14b928a2c963eb5d73cdbdca07c4b5418d158bb7.png)
The Tiny Takeover Update is live! Every new Baby mob has a Shiny Variant ready to be found!
I mean look how cute this fox is!
